note: Native `.replace` on the `base` string inside the test-local `joinPath` helper. SPEC ┬ž2 puts the String ban in scope for test files. Replace with `Str.replace(/\/+$/u, "")(base)` (or a `pipe`/`flow` form). Identical helper appears in `parity-helpers.test.ts`.

Native `.replace` on the `segment` string inside the `segments.map((segment) => ...)` callback of the test-local `joinPath` helper. Replace with `Str.replace(/^\/+|\/+$/gu, "")`. The surrounding `.map`/`.filter`/`.join` are Array methods which are out of scope in test files per SPEC ┬ž2 (only JSON+String are in scope for tests).

Native `.replace` on the `base` string inside the test-local `joinPath` helper (duplicate of the helper in `sandbox.test.ts`). SPEC ┬ž2 puts the String ban in scope for test files. Replace with `Str.replace(/\/+$/u, "")(base)`.

Native `.replace` on the `segment` string inside the `segments.map((segment) => ...)` callback of the test-local `joinPath` helper. Replace with `Str.replace(/^\/+|\/+$/gu, "")`. Surrounding `.map`/`.filter`/`.join` are Array methods, out of scope in tests per SPEC ┬ž2.
